'''Galactic Crystal Creations''', also known as '''Garnib Crystal Corporation''', collected and marketed [[Garnib crystal]]s from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Garnib]], which the corporation had bought the rights to.

{{Company-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume One]]'' refers to the entity as Galactic Crystal Creations, where as the ''[[Star Wars Gamemaster Screen]]'' refers to the company as Garnib Crystal Corporation.
